calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment And Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion To Vacate Judgment And Renewal Of Judgment is
granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Pos-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-28-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
